title: Improve Judgment: - Break It Down: Divide Events into Clear, Mutually Exclusive Parts
subtitle: Clarify Probabilities
description:
To improve judgment:
- Break it down: Divide events into clear, mutually exclusive parts.
- Add them up: Compare individual probabilities to the total likelihood.
- Check your math: Avoid underestimating by verifying if the sum makes sense.

Example: When assessing risks for a project, split them into categories (e.g., budget, time, resources) and evaluate each separately.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.
